attributes.description: Deep PostgreSQL and connection pool monitoring for Supabase - query throughput, tuple operations, conflicts, BGWriter, WAL, PgBouncer pooling, Go SQL pool, and replication lag.

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Total Active Database Backends` = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(pg_stat_database_num_backends))

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Total Active Database Backends` = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(pg_stat_database_num_backends))

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Average Active Database Backends` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(pg_stat_database_num_backends)) BY `Time` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time` ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Average Active Database Backends` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(pg_stat_database_num_backends)) BY `Time` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time` ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Xact Rollback Total` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_database_xact_rollback_total)), `Tup Inserted Total` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_database_tup_inserted_total)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Xact Rollback Total` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_database_xact_rollback_total)), `Tup Inserted Total` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_database_tup_inserted_total)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE `metrics.pg_database_size_bytes` IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Database Size` = MAX(`metrics.pg_database_size_bytes`) BY `Database` = `attributes.datname`
| SORT `Database Size` DESC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE `metrics.pg_database_size_bytes` IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Database Size` = MAX(`metrics.pg_database_size_bytes`) BY `Database` = `attributes.datname`
| SORT `Database Size` DESC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE `metrics.pg_database_size_bytes` IS NOT NULL
| STATS `avg_size` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.pg_database_size_bytes`)) BY time_bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), datname = attributes.datname
| RENAME `avg_size` AS `Database Size Growth`
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE `metrics.pg_database_size_bytes` IS NOT NULL
| STATS `avg_size` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.pg_database_size_bytes`)) BY time_bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), datname = attributes.datname
| RENAME `avg_size` AS `Database Size Growth`
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE pg_wal_size_mb IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, pg_wal_size_mb
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE pg_wal_size_mb IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, pg_wal_size_mb
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE pg_stat_bgwriter_checkpoints_timed_total IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, pg_stat_bgwriter_checkpoints_timed_total
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE pg_stat_bgwriter_checkpoints_timed_total IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, pg_stat_bgwriter_checkpoints_timed_total
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE pg_stat_statements_total_time_seconds IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, pg_stat_statements_total_time_seconds
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE pg_stat_statements_total_time_seconds IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, pg_stat_statements_total_time_seconds
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE `metrics.pg_stat_statements_total_queries` IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, `metrics.pg_stat_statements_total_queries`
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE `metrics.pg_stat_statements_total_queries` IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, `metrics.pg_stat_statements_total_queries`
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Tup Fetched` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_database_tup_fetched_total)), `Tup Updated` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_database_tup_updated_total)), `Tup Inserted` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_database_tup_inserted_total)) BY `Time` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time` ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Tup Fetched` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_database_tup_fetched_total)), `Tup Updated` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_database_tup_updated_total)), `Tup Inserted` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_database_tup_inserted_total)) BY `Time` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time` ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `PostgreSQL Temp Bytes` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_database_temp_bytes_total)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `PostgreSQL Temp Bytes` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_database_temp_bytes_total)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Lock Conflicts` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_database_conflicts_confl_lock_total)), `Deadlock Conflicts` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_database_conflicts_confl_deadlock_total)), `Snapshot Conflicts` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_database_conflicts_confl_snapshot_total)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Lock Conflicts` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_database_conflicts_confl_lock_total)), `Deadlock Conflicts` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_database_conflicts_confl_deadlock_total)), `Snapshot Conflicts` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_database_conflicts_confl_snapshot_total)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Checkpoints Timed` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_bgwriter_checkpoints_timed_total)), `Max Written Clean` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_bgwriter_maxwritten_clean_total)), `Checkpoint Sync Time` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_bgwriter_checkpoint_sync_time_total)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Checkpoints Timed` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_bgwriter_checkpoints_timed_total)), `Max Written Clean` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_bgwriter_maxwritten_clean_total)), `Checkpoint Sync Time` = SUM(RATE(pg_stat_bgwriter_checkpoint_sync_time_total)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

attributes.title: PostgreSQL BGWriter: Checkpoints Timed, Max Written Clean & Sync Time

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `PostgreSQL Buffer Cache Hits` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.pg_stat_database_blks_hit_total`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `PostgreSQL Buffer Cache Hits` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.pg_stat_database_blks_hit_total`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `WAL Pending Count` = SUM(RATE(metrics.pg_ls_archive_statusdir_wal_pending_count)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `WAL Pending Count` = SUM(RATE(metrics.pg_ls_archive_statusdir_wal_pending_count)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Server Active Connections` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(pgbouncer_pools_server_active_connections)), `Client Waiting Connections` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(pgbouncer_pools_client_waiting_connections)), `Server Testing Connections` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(pgbouncer_pools_server_testing_connections)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Server Active Connections` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(pgbouncer_pools_server_active_connections)), `Client Waiting Connections` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(pgbouncer_pools_client_waiting_connections)), `Server Testing Connections` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(pgbouncer_pools_server_testing_connections)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `PgBouncer Avg Max Client Wait Time` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.pgbouncer_pools_client_maxwait_seconds`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `PgBouncer Avg Max Client Wait Time` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.pgbouncer_pools_client_maxwait_seconds`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `SQL Transactions Pooled` = SUM(RATE(pgbouncer_stats_sql_transactions_pooled_total)), `Received Bytes` = SUM(RATE(pgbouncer_stats_received_bytes_total)) BY `Time` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time` ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `SQL Transactions Pooled` = SUM(RATE(pgbouncer_stats_sql_transactions_pooled_total)), `Received Bytes` = SUM(RATE(pgbouncer_stats_received_bytes_total)) BY `Time` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time` ASC

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Client Wait Seconds Total` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.pgbouncer_stats_client_wait_seconds_total`)), `Server In Transaction Seconds Total` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.pgbouncer_stats_server_in_transaction_seconds_total`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

| SORT bucket ASC

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Max Connections` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.pgbouncer_databases_max_connections`)), `Max Client Connections` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.pgbouncer_config_max_client_connections`)), `Pool Size` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.pgbouncer_databases_pool_size`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Max Connections` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.pgbouncer_databases_max_connections`)), `Max Client Connections` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.pgbouncer_config_max_client_connections`)), `Pool Size` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.pgbouncer_databases_pool_size`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*

| SORT bucket ASC

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Max Open Connections` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.db_sql_connection_max_open`)), `Wait Duration (ms Total)` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.db_sql_connection_wait_duration_milliseconds_total`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

| STATS `Max Open Connections` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.db_sql_connection_max_open`)), `Wait Duration (ms Total)` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.db_sql_connection_wait_duration_milliseconds_total`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE `metrics.physical_replication_lag_physical_replication_lag_seconds` IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, `metrics.physical_replication_lag_physical_replication_lag_seconds`
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE `metrics.physical_replication_lag_physical_replication_lag_seconds` IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, `metrics.physical_replication_lag_physical_replication_lag_seconds`
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE `metrics.physical_replication_lag_is_wal_replay_paused` IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, `metrics.physical_replication_lag_is_wal_replay_paused`
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE `metrics.physical_replication_lag_is_wal_replay_paused` IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, `metrics.physical_replication_lag_is_wal_replay_paused`
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Physical Replication Lag` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.physical_replication_lag_physical_replication_lag_seconds`)) BY `Time` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time` ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Physical Replication Lag` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.physical_replication_lag_physical_replication_lag_seconds`)) BY `Time` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time` ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Avg pg_status_in_recovery` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.pg_status_in_recovery`)), `Avg WAL Replay Paused` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.physical_replication_lag_is_wal_replay_paused`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Avg pg_status_in_recovery` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.pg_status_in_recovery`)), `Avg WAL Replay Paused` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.physical_replication_lag_is_wal_replay_paused`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
